content.text:
[cron:13352d2a-0d9f-4019-b0aa-31df93e9615e 每日早报-国际新闻] 你是南天的AI助手。现在是北京时间早上7点，请生成国际新闻精选推送。必须使用 web_search 搜索获取最新国际新闻（BBC和纽约时报），然后严格按以下格式输出：

🌍 国际新闻精选 🌍
📅 [当天日期]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 BBC精选：
1️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
2️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 纽约时报精选：
6️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · 国际视野

直接输出，不要额外解释。必须通过搜索获取真实数据，不要编造。
Current time: Thursday, May 7th, 2026 - 11:08 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-07 23:08 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

content.thinking:
用户要求我作为南天的AI助手，在北京时间早上7点生成国际新闻精选推送。用户指定了：

2. 必须搜索 BBC 和纽约时报
3. 严格按指定格式输出
4. 不要额外解释
5. 必须通过搜索获取真实数据，不要编造

当前时间是 UTC 2026-05-07 23:08，北京时间是 UTC+8，所以北京时间是 2026-05-08 07:08，正好是早上7点多，符合要求。

我需要：
1. 使用 web_search 搜索 BBC 国际新闻
2. 使用 web_search 搜索纽约时报国际新闻
3. 按照指定格式输出

让我先搜索 BBC 和纽约时报的国际新闻。

content.text: 我将为您搜索最新国际新闻并生成早报。

arguments.query: New York Times international news today

[Rwandan singer dies as he was being released from prisonThe former university lecturer was a vocal critic of the government and ruling Rwandan Patriotic Front party.7 hrs agoAfrica](/news/articles/cevpxn0ddp9o)

[Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to planFor the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow. 7 hrs agoEurope](/news/articles/cwy2gj2jlr8o)
[LIVEUS says it has targeted Iranian military facilities after responding to attacks on navy shipsThe US says it targeted Iranian "missile and drone launch sites; command and control locations; and intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance nodes".](https://www.bbc.com/news/live/c2021zg819lt)
[Trump gives 4 July ultimatum to EU to approve trade deal with USThe US president said the European Union must enact the trade deal agreed last year and drop tariffs on American goods to zero.2 hrs agoBusiness](/news/articles/cp3pyk4nw3lo)

[Five killed in huge fire at packed Mexico fairgroundThe blaze in the south-eastern city of Villahermosa erupted during a concert reportedly attended by some 135,000 people.](/news/articles/cq6py38q81ro)

[China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministersThe announcement follows recent ousting of several top officials in China's military.](/news/articles/clypjx383j2o)
['I wouldn't pay it' - Trump on USA ticket priceUS President Donald Trump says he "wouldn't pay it either" when asked about the potential ticket price to watch his country play Paraguay in their 2026 World Cup opener.](/sport/football/articles/cdxpq70grzlo)
[Valverde cut head when he 'accidentally hit table' in Tchouameni rowFederico Valverde went to hospital after a dressing room row with Real Madrid team-mate Aurelien Tchouameni which left him with a head injury after he "accidentally hit a table".](/sport/football/articles/c98r4218l73o)

## Features

[How worried should we be about hantavirus?Some passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus have already taken flights to numerous countries.](/news/articles/c98r199e195o)

['My heart is in a million pieces': Vigils in Australia for five-year-old allegedly killed in OutbackKumanjayi Little Baby was found dead after going missing from an Aboriginal town camp in Alice Springs.](/news/articles/cdeplz29p7go)
[Crowds cheer China's new snooker star on return from championship winWu Yize, 22, receives a rock star's welcome after becoming second-youngest player to win a world title.](/news/articles/c62ex9ykl53o)
[The no-nonsense judge calling the shots in Musk v Altman trialThe feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.](/news/articles/cx214rnlpn7o)

## Highlights

- ### [Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Exchange Fire Amid a Declared Truce](https://www.nytimes.com/live/2026/05/07/world/iran-trump-hormuz-peace-deal)
The U.S. military said it struck Iranian military facilities and other targets after, it said, Iran fired on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz.CreditU.S. Centcom, via Getty Images
- ### [The Long Journey From the Strait of Hormuz to the Gas Tank](/interactive/2026/05/07/world/middleeast/oil-tanker-strait-hormuz-iran-war.html)
Even if the Strait of Hormuz reopened today, oil would still take more than a month to reach consumers. The economic shock from the Iran war could take far longer to ease. By Agnes Chang and CreditThe New York Times
- ### [German Leaders Clash With Spy Chiefs Over Domestic Threat From Iran](/2026/05/07/world/europe/germany-merz-iran-security-threat-spy.html)
Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk. By Jim TankersleyPhilip Kaleta and Christopher F. SchuetzeCreditEbrahim Noroozi/Associated Press
- ### [‘A Total Collapse’: Elections May Expose Britain’s Fraying Political System](/2026/05/07/world/europe/uk-local-elections-2026-keir-starmer.html)
Polls predict historic losses for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party on Thursday as anti-immigrant Reform U.K. makes gains, and a new era of multiparty politics takes shape. By Michael D. Shear and Stephen CastleCreditAndrew Testa for The New York Times
